prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the historical performance and volatility of SPGI over the past 5 years. The annualized volatility was calculated to be approximately 22.15%, and the average daily return (drift) was approximately 0.0780%. The point estimate ($449.16) is derived by projecting the current price ($441.88) forward 21 days using this historical daily drift. The confidence intervals are constructed around this point estimate using the calculated standard deviation of price movement over 21 days (approximately $28.28), which is derived from the current price, annualized volatility, and time horizon. A normal distribution for price changes is assumed for constructing these intervals, utilizing standard Z-scores for each confidence level.
